title: Endhanced End
body:
#

A Resource pack for Minecraft 1.19.2, 1.20.1, 1.21+

#

Endhanced End is a Minecraft Resource Pack that focuses on further updating textures relating to the End Dimension.
Currently, the resource pack retextures the Portal Frame, Ender Dragon, Dragon Egg, Elytra & Chorus Fruit blocks, along with having support for the Ender Trigon mod!

Mod Support

 1.19.2 1.20.1 1.21+

Ender Trigon

 ✓ ✓ X
In addition, the pack has a couple of add-on resource packs built in, just open the zip file and head to the "addons" folder & simply drag the folder to ".minecraft/resourcepacks"
Said add-on packs for Endhanced End include:

Addon Pack

Eetle Elytra
